												<span class="elementor-toggle-icon elementor-toggle-icon-left" aria-hidden="true">

								<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened"><svg class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-up" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M288.662 352H31.338c-17.818 0-26.741-21.543-14.142-34.142l128.662-128.662c7.81-7.81 20.474-7.81 28.284 0l128.662 128.662c12.6 12.599 3.676 34.142-14.142 34.142z"></path></svg></span>
													</span>
												<a class="elementor-toggle-title" tabindex="0">Weather and Climate</a>
					</div>

					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2333" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="3" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2333"><p>Familiarize yourself with the weather conditions during your travel dates. Bantayan Island enjoys a tropical climate, so pack lightweight, breathable clothing, sun protection, and rain gear, especially if traveling during the rainy season.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-toggle-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2334" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="4" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2334" aria-expanded="false">
												<span class="elementor-toggle-icon elementor-toggle-icon-left" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-closed"><svg class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-right" viewBox="0 0 192 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0 384.662V127.338c0-17.818 21.543-26.741 34.142-14.142l128.662 128.662c7.81 7.81 7.81 20.474 0 28.284L34.142 398.804C21.543 411.404 0 402.48 0 384.662z"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened"><svg class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-up" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M288.662 352H31.338c-17.818 0-26.741-21.543-14.142-34.142l128.662-128.662c7.81-7.81 20.474-7.81 28.284 0l128.662 128.662c12.6 12.599 3.676 34.142-14.142 34.142z"></path></svg></span>
													</span>
												<a class="elementor-toggle-title" tabindex="0">Local Currency and Banking</a>
					</div>

					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2334" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="4" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2334"><p>The local currency is the Philippine Peso (PHP). Make sure to have some cash on hand, as not all places accept credit cards. ATMs are available, but it’s best to check with your bank about international withdrawal fees.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-toggle-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2335" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="5" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2335" aria-expanded="false">
												<span class="elementor-toggle-icon elementor-toggle-icon-left" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-closed"><svg class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-right" viewBox="0 0 192 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0 384.662V127.338c0-17.818 21.543-26.741 34.142-14.142l128.662 128.662c7.81 7.81 7.81 20.474 0 28.284L34.142 398.804C21.543 411.404 0 402.48 0 384.662z"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened"><svg class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-up" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M288.662 352H31.338c-17.818 0-26.741-21.543-14.142-34.142l128.662-128.662c7.81-7.81 20.474-7.81 28.284 0l128.662 128.662c12.6 12.599 3.676 34.142-14.142 34.142z"></path></svg></span>
													</span>
												<a class="elementor-toggle-title" tabindex="0">Language and Communication</a>
					</div>

					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2335" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="5" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2335"><p>While English is widely spoken, learning a few basic phrases in Filipino can be helpful and appreciated by locals. Consider getting a local SIM card for your phone for easier communication and internet access.</p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-toggle-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2336" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="6" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2336" aria-expanded="false">
												<span class="elementor-toggle-icon elementor-toggle-icon-left" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-closed"><svg class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-right" viewBox="0 0 192 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0 384.662V127.338c0-17.818 21.543-26.741 34.142-14.142l128.662 128.662c7.81 7.81 7.81 20.474 0 28.284L34.142 398.804C21.543 411.404 0 402.48 0 384.662z"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened"><svg class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-up" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M288.662 352H31.338c-17.818 0-26.741-21.543-14.142-34.142l128.662-128.662c7.81-7.81 20.474-7.81 28.284 0l128.662 128.662c12.6 12.599 3.676 34.142-14.142 34.142z"></path></svg></span>
													</span>
												<a class="elementor-toggle-title" tabindex="0">Cultural Etiquette</a>
					</div>

					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2336" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="6" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2336"><p>Be respectful of local customs and traditions. Dress modestly when visiting religious sites and always ask for permission before taking photos of people.</p><p><a title="About Bantayan Island" href="https://bantayanisland.info/information/about/">About Bantayan Island</a></p></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-toggle-item">
					<div id="elementor-tab-title-2337" class="elementor-tab-title" data-tab="7" role="button" aria-controls="elementor-tab-content-2337" aria-expanded="false">
												<span class="elementor-toggle-icon elementor-toggle-icon-left" aria-hidden="true">
															<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-closed"><svg class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-right" viewBox="0 0 192 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0 384.662V127.338c0-17.818 21.543-26.741 34.142-14.142l128.662 128.662c7.81 7.81 7.81 20.474 0 28.284L34.142 398.804C21.543 411.404 0 402.48 0 384.662z"></path></svg></span>
								<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened"><svg class="elementor-toggle-icon-opened e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-up" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M288.662 352H31.338c-17.818 0-26.741-21.543-14.142-34.142l128.662-128.662c7.81-7.81 20.474-7.81 28.284 0l128.662 128.662c12.6 12.599 3.676 34.142-14.142 34.142z"></path></svg></span>
													</span>
												<a class="elementor-toggle-title" tabindex="0">Transportation</a>
					</div>

					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2337" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="7" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2337"><p>Research transportation options to and within Bantayan Island. Whether you choose a ferry, bus, or private transfer, it’s good to know the schedules and costs in advance. We can highly recommend following links:</p><ul><li><a href="https://bantayanisland.info/information/how-to-get-there/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">How to get there</a></li><li><a href="https://bantayanisland.info/transport/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Transportation</a></li><li><a href="https://bantayanisland.info/transport/private-transport/">Private Transfer</a></li><li><a href="https://bantayanisland.info/transport/bus/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Bus Schedule and Fares</a></li><li><a href="https://bantayanisland.info/transport/ferry/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Ferry Schedule and Fares</a></li></ul></div>
				</div>
							<div class="elementor-toggle-item">

															<span class="elementor-toggle-icon-closed"><svg class="e-font-icon-svg e-fas-caret-right" viewBox="0 0 192 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0 384.662V127.338c0-17.818 21.543-26.741 34.142-14.142l128.662 128.662c7.81 7.81 7.81 20.474 0 28.284L34.142 398.804C21.543 411.404 0 402.48 0 384.662z"></path></svg></span>

													</span>
												<a class="elementor-toggle-title" tabindex="0">Accommodations</a>
					</div>

					<div id="elementor-tab-content-2338" class="elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix" data-tab="8" role="region" aria-labelledby="elementor-tab-title-2338"><p>Book your accommodations in advance, especially during peak tourist seasons. Look for reviews and ratings to ensure a comfortable stay that meets your needs. For your guidance we can recommend to check the following links:</p><ul><li><a title="Accommodations Bantayan Island" href="https://bantayanisland.info/accommodations/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Accommodations Overview</a></li><li><a title="Hotels Bantayan Island" href="https://bantayanisland.info/accommodations/hotels/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Hotels</a></li><li><a title="Vacation Rentals Bantayan Island" href="https://bantayanisland.info/accommodations/vacation-rentals/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Vacation Rentals</a></li></ul></div>

Whether you’re interested in island hopping, exploring natural parks, or relaxing on the beach, knowing what to expect can enhance your experience.</p><ul><li><a title="Activities Bantayan Island" href="https://bantayanisland.info/activities/">Activities Overview</a></li><li><a title="Activities Bantayan Island" href="https://bantayanisland.info/activities/island-hopping/">Island Hopping</a></li><li><a title="Activities Bantayan Island" href="https://bantayanisland.info/activities/day-tours/">Day Tours / Land Tours</a></li></ul></div>

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Important Note</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-9b3d313 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="9b3d313" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p data-start="133" data-end="347">Please be informed that flights between Cebu and Bantayan are <strong data-start="217" data-end="254">non-refundable and non-rebookable</strong>. This policy is set by the charter company, and as a reseller, we are required to follow it.</p><p data-start="349" data-end="795">Kindly also note that <strong data-start="371" data-end="423">flight schedules may change without prior notice</strong>, as these are solely managed by the charter operator. Flights may also be <strong>cancelled without prior warning</strong> — even if you have already received your flight voucher. Cancellations can occur for safety reasons, such as unfavorable weather conditions (the runway on Bantayan Island is relatively short), as well as due to operational issues on the part of the charter company. In case the flight is cancelled, a refund can be provided within up to 2 months. The process may take longer because the charter company is not accustomed to using online banking or online payment systems.</p><p data-start="349" data-end="795">You are encouraged to review the <strong data-start="1196" data-end="1230">Air Passenger’s Bill of Rights</strong> and the carrier’s <strong data-start="1249" data-end="1273">Terms and Conditions</strong> here: <em><strong><a href="https://kingacestravel.ph/index.php/services/" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">Terms and Conditions</a></strong></em>.</p><p data-start="349" data-end="795">Please arrive at the airport <strong data-start="1336" data-end="1373">at least 2 hours before departure</strong>. Considering the required waiting time before departure, the short flight, and—if you have luggage—the waiting time after arrival, the total travel time may still take around <strong data-start="1549" data-end="1560">3 hours</strong>. For a more dependable alternative, you may wish to book a private transfer: <strong><a href="https://travelvisayas.org/product/private-transfer-cebu-bantayan/" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"><em data-start="611" data-end="646">Private Transfer Cebu to Bantayan</em>.</a></strong></p><p data-start="797" data-end="972"><strong>SYKE Travel &amp; Tours acts solely as a reseller of these flights and therefore assumes no responsibility for the safety, operation, or performance of the air service; all operational and safety-related responsibilities rest exclusively with the charter company and the operator.</strong></p><p data-start="797" data-end="972">We (SYKE Travel &amp; Tours) offer these flights only because we are the <strong data-start="844" data-end="893">only DOT-accredited travel agency in Santa Fe</strong> (Bantayan Island) and are responsible for the online marketing of our beautiful Bantayan Island. For a more <strong data-start="985" data-end="1023">convenient, flexible, and reliable</strong> way to travel to and from Bantayan Island, we recommend booking our private transfer service here: <strong><a href="https://travelvisayas.org/product/private-transfer-cebu-bantayan/" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"><em data-start="611" data-end="646">Private Transfer Cebu to Bantayan</em>.</a></strong></p><p data-start="1678" data-end="1836">If you have a <strong>connecting flight</strong> to or from Cebu, we strongly recommend using our <strong data-start="1759" data-end="1796">reliable private transfer service</strong>: <strong><a href="https://travelvisayas.org/product/private-transfer-cebu-bantayan/" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank"><em data-start="611" data-end="646">Private Transfer Cebu to Bantayan</em>.</a></strong></p>								</div>

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Ecological Note</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6dbed67 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="6dbed67" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p>Small charter flights are fast, but they also have a disproportionately large climate impact per passenger when compared with road transfers. An ATR-72 on a short (~30-minute) Cebu–Bantayan hop produces roughly <strong data-start="4342" data-end="4372">15–55 kg CO₂ per passenger</strong> depending on how full the aircraft is; a shared private transfer plus ferry is typically <strong data-start="4462" data-end="4501">lower (≈10–35 kg CO₂ per passenger)</strong>. In other words, where sustainability matters, choosing a shared private transfer (or combining passengers in one vehicle) usually results in a <strong data-start="4646" data-end="4681">smaller environmental footprint</strong> than taking a lightly-filled charter flight.</p>								</div>

				RESTAURANTS				</h2>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-89ebc8c elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="89ebc8c" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Restaurants – Discover the Culinary Delights of Bantayan Island</h2>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ef82349 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="ef82349" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p>Bantayan Island is not only a tropical paradise but also a vibrant haven for food enthusiasts seeking culinary adventures. With a diverse array of restaurants offering everything from freshly caught seafood to a wide selection of international dishes like <a href="https://bantayanisland.info/restaurants/">schnitzel</a>, pasta, and burgers, visitors can indulge in a gastronomic journey that caters to all tastes and preferences. This idyllic location boasts unique flavors and dining experiences that truly embody the essence of island life.</p>								</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-8316fd8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-template" data-id="8316fd8" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="template.default">

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Schnitzel Paradise Bantayan Island – SMAK's Restobar</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-477cd95 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="477cd95" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p>When it comes to savoring the most delectable schnitzels on Bantayan Island, there&#8217;s one place that stands out above the rest: &#8220;<a href="https://smaks.travelvisayas.org" rel="nofollow noopener" target="_blank">SMAK&#8217;s Restobar</a>.&#8221; Nestled at Saagundo Street, Poblacion. The Schnitzel Paradise has earned a well-deserved reputation for serving up some of the finest schnitzels you&#8217;ll ever taste.</p>								</div>

									<p>Discover everything Bantayan Island has to offer in one place. Our curated island inventory brings together trusted <strong data-start="339" data-end="357">accommodations</strong> (hotels and vacation rentals), <strong data-start="389" data-end="417">travel and tour services</strong>, <strong data-start="419" data-end="436">places to see</strong>, and <strong data-start="442" data-end="468">local stores and shops</strong>—making it easy to plan your stay and explore the island like a local.</p>								</div>

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Description</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5b9114c elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="5b9114c" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p data-start="51" data-end="339"><strong data-start="51" data-end="80">SMAK’s Hotel and Restobar</strong> is a cozy garden resort and well-known <em data-start="120" data-end="140">Schnitzel Paradise</em> located in the heart of Santa Fe, Bantayan Island. Surrounded by a relaxed tropical atmosphere, it offers a comfortable and welcoming place to stay just minutes from the beach and local attractions.</p>
<p data-start="341" data-end="595" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">The hotel features comfortable rooms for <strong data-start="382" data-end="437">solo travelers, couples, families, and small groups</strong>, while the restobar serves Filipino and European favorites—especially our popular schnitzel—alongside local and international dishes, perfect for a laid-back island stay.</p>

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Description</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5b9114c elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="5b9114c" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p data-start="118" data-end="375"><strong data-start="118" data-end="168">SYKE’s Guest House – your home away from home.</strong> Formerly known as SYKE’s Guest House, we are proud to welcome you today as <strong data-start="244" data-end="260">SMAK’s Hotel</strong>, a cozy and friendly place designed for travelers who value comfort, convenience, and a relaxed island atmosphere.</p>
<p data-start="377" data-end="844">Our property offers a total of <strong data-start="408" data-end="476">two spacious ground-floor apartments, known as SMAK’s Apartments</strong>, ideal for families, couples, or guests who prefer extra space and privacy. On the upper floor, we feature <strong data-start="584" data-end="626">six comfortable double to triple rooms</strong>, perfectly suited for solo travelers, couples, and small groups. Each accommodation is thoughtfully arranged to provide a pleasant stay, whether you are visiting Bantayan Island for a short holiday or a longer escape.</p>
<p data-start="846" data-end="1144" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Located in a quiet yet accessible area, SMAK’s Hotel allows guests to unwind and feel at home while remaining close to the beach, local restaurants, and key attractions. With warm hospitality and a welcoming ambiance, SMAK’s Hotel is the perfect base for exploring Bantayan Island at your own pace.</p>

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Description</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2e386fc elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2e386fc" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p data-start="128" data-end="557">If you’re craving a proper <strong data-start="155" data-end="168">Schnitzel</strong>, <strong data-start="170" data-end="189">SMAK’s Restobar</strong> is the place to be. More than just a restaurant, SMAK’s Restobar is a cozy meeting spot where great Filipino and European food, refreshing drinks, and a relaxed island atmosphere come together. From hearty breakfast options to satisfying lunches, flavorful dinners, and laid-back evening drinks, we serve comfort food made to be enjoyed—whether you’re starting your day or winding it down.</p>
<p data-start="559" data-end="899">Located at <strong data-start="570" data-end="609">SMAK’s Hotel – The Fountain of Love</strong>, SMAK’s Restobar is also a favorite stop for travelers exploring Bantayan Island. Our friendly team welcomes guests and locals alike, creating a warm, home-away-from-home vibe that keeps people coming back. Good food, good company, and genuine hospitality—this is what SMAK’s is all about.</p>

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Opening Hours</h3>				</div>

									SMAK’s Restobar is open daily from 7:30 AM to 9:00 PM, serving breakfast, lunch, dinner, and relaxed evening drinks all week long. 🍽️🍹								</div>

									<p>A very cozy garden resort in Bantayan, offering a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere that immediately makes you feel at home. The resort features a beautiful collection of unique trees and flowering plants, creating a lush, green setting that is perfect for unwinding. The food is excellent and thoughtfully prepared, making it a great spot for both casual dining and special gatherings. Guests can also enjoy fun amenities such as a karaoke facility for entertainment and a trampoline for kids, making it especially family-friendly. Overall, it’s a charming place with a cool ambiance—definitely worth a visit.</p>

									<p>Bantayan Butterfly Garden is a peaceful nature sanctuary where visitors can experience the beauty of tropical butterflies up close. Surrounded by lush greenery, the garden offers a relaxing escape and a unique opportunity to learn about butterfly species, their life cycle, and the importance of conservation. It is an ideal stop for families, nature lovers, and anyone looking for a calm and educational experience on Bantayan Island.</p>

					<div class="e-con-inner">
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7cd1d851 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="7cd1d851" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">
					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Description</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2918fa18 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2918fa18" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p>The Ruins in Santa Fe, Bantayan Island is a well-known and very popular spot to visit. Its stunning location on a cliff with breathtaking sea views makes it a perfect place for photos, whether during the day, at sunrise, or at sunset. According to local stories, the house was once owned by a German national who had a lease agreement for the land, granting him the right to build on it. After his passing, no one inherited the lease or had the right to live in the house, so the property reverted to its original owner. Left unattended, the house was exposed to the elements. In 2013, Typhoon Yolanda struck the area hard, causing significant damage, and over time the house slowly transformed into the ruins that we see today.</p>
								</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ac8ffc9 elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="ac8ffc9" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="heading.default">

									No Entrance Fee || Open 24 hours								</div>

					<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Description</h3>				</div>
				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2918fa18 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="2918fa18" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
									<p>Mangrove Garden (Barangay Obo-ob, Bantayan Island) &#8211; Discover the tranquil beauty of the Mangrove Garden in Barangay Obo-ob, Bantayan Island. This scenic eco-attraction is a community-led project managed by OMAGIECA, offering visitors a peaceful walk through lush mangroves while supporting local conservation efforts. A perfect stop for nature lovers and those looking to experience Bantayan’s sustainable tourism initiatives.</p>

</div>			<script type="616d6efb378c44a4e902b819-text/javascript">
				const registerAllyAction = () => {
					if ( ! window?.ElementorProFrontendConfig || ! window?.elementorFrontend?.utils?.urlActions ) {
						return;
					}

					elementorFrontend.utils.urlActions.addAction( 'allyWidget:open', () => {
						if (window?.ea11yWidget?.widget?.open) {
							return window.ea11yWidget.widget.isOpen()
								? window.ea11yWidget.widget.close()
								: window.ea11yWidget.widget.open();
						}
					} );
				};

				const waitingLimit = 30;
				let retryCounter = 0;

				const waitForElementorPro = () => {
					return new Promise( ( resolve ) => {
						const intervalId = setInterval( () => {
							if ( retryCounter === waitingLimit ) {
								resolve( null );
							}

							retryCounter++;

							if ( window.elementorFrontend && window?.elementorFrontend?.utils?.urlActions ) {
								clearInterval( intervalId );
								resolve( window.elementorFrontend );
							}
								}, 100 ); // Check every 100 milliseconds for availability of elementorFrontend
					});
				};

				waitForElementorPro().then( () => { registerAllyAction(); });
			</script>
						<script type="616d6efb378c44a4e902b819-text/javascript">
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
			<link rel='stylesheet' id='elementor-post-21761-css' href='https://bantayanisland.info/wp-content/uploads/elementor/css/post-21761.css' media='all' />

<script src="https://hb.wpmucdn.com/bantayanisland.info/43f826ca-802d-4d38-9926-b446dc5281e4.js" id="wphb-6-js" type="616d6efb378c44a4e902b819-text/javascript"></script>
<script id="wphb-6-js-after" type="616d6efb378c44a4e902b819-text/javascript">
		if ('undefined' != typeof window.jQuery) {
			jQuery(document).ready(function ($) {
				$(document).on('elementor/popup/show', () => {
					let rev_cats = cmplz_categories.reverse();
					for (let key in rev_cats) {
						if (rev_cats.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
							let category = cmplz_categories[key];
							if (cmplz_has_consent(category)) {
								document.querySelectorAll('[data-category="' + category + '"]').forEach(obj => {
									cmplz_remove_placeholder(obj);
								});
							}
						}
					}

					let services = cmplz_get_services_on_page();
					for (let key in services) {
						if (services.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
							let service = services[key].service;
							let category = services[key].category;
							if (cmplz_has_service_consent(service, category)) {
								document.querySelectorAll('[data-service="' + service + '"]').forEach(obj => {
									cmplz_remove_placeholder(obj);
								});
							}
						}
					}
				});
			});
		}
    
    
		
			document.addEventListener("cmplz_enable_category", function(consentData) {
				var category = consentData.detail.category;
				var services = consentData.detail.services;
				var blockedContentContainers = [];
				let selectorVideo = '.cmplz-elementor-widget-video-playlist[data-category="'+category+'"],.elementor-widget-video[data-category="'+category+'"]';
				let selectorGeneric = '[data-cmplz-elementor-href][data-category="'+category+'"]';
				for (var skey in services) {
					if (services.hasOwnProperty(skey)) {
						let service = skey;
						selectorVideo +=',.cmplz-elementor-widget-video-playlist[data-service="'+service+'"],.elementor-widget-video[data-service="'+service+'"]';
						selectorGeneric +=',[data-cmplz-elementor-href][data-service="'+service+'"]';
					}
				}
				document.querySelectorAll(selectorVideo).forEach(obj => {
					let elementService = obj.getAttribute('data-service');
					if ( cmplz_is_service_denied(elementService) ) {
						return;
					}
					if (obj.classList.contains('cmplz-elementor-activated')) return;
					obj.classList.add('cmplz-elementor-activated');

					if ( obj.hasAttribute('data-cmplz_elementor_widget_type') ){
						let attr = obj.getAttribute('data-cmplz_elementor_widget_type');
						obj.classList.removeAttribute('data-cmplz_elementor_widget_type');
						obj.classList.setAttribute('data-widget_type', attr);
					}
					if (obj.classList.contains('cmplz-elementor-widget-video-playlist')) {
						obj.classList.remove('cmplz-elementor-widget-video-playlist');
						obj.classList.add('elementor-widget-video-playlist');
					}
					obj.setAttribute('data-settings', obj.getAttribute('data-cmplz-elementor-settings'));
					blockedContentContainers.push(obj);
				});

				document.querySelectorAll(selectorGeneric).forEach(obj => {
					let elementService = obj.getAttribute('data-service');
					if ( cmplz_is_service_denied(elementService) ) {
						return;
					}
					if (obj.classList.contains('cmplz-elementor-activated')) return;

					if (obj.classList.contains('cmplz-fb-video')) {
						obj.classList.remove('cmplz-fb-video');
						obj.classList.add('fb-video');
					}

					obj.classList.add('cmplz-elementor-activated');
					obj.setAttribute('data-href', obj.getAttribute('data-cmplz-elementor-href'));
					blockedContentContainers.push(obj.closest('.elementor-widget'));
				});

				/**
				 * Trigger the widgets in Elementor
				 */
				for (var key in blockedContentContainers) {
					if (blockedContentContainers.hasOwnProperty(key) && blockedContentContainers[key] !== undefined) {
						let blockedContentContainer = blockedContentContainers[key];
						if (elementorFrontend.elementsHandler) {
							elementorFrontend.elementsHandler.runReadyTrigger(blockedContentContainer)
						}
						var cssIndex = blockedContentContainer.getAttribute('data-placeholder_class_index');
						blockedContentContainer.classList.remove('cmplz-blocked-content-container');
						blockedContentContainer.classList.remove('cmplz-placeholder-' + cssIndex);
					}
				}

			});
		
		
//# sourceURL=wphb-6-js-after
